proposition: A 9,327.14 CZK debt to the Prague public-transport operator is consistent in scale with an escalated unpaid-fare claim, but the filed documents do not state the debt's origin. The matter was personal, small, and resolved by payment within ~9 weeks; no enforcement directed at Able.cz s.r.o. itself was found in the preserved filings. Company-level insolvency could NOT be checked: the insolvency register was BLOCKED (ISIR returned HTTP 500 on both attempts).
shortTitle: A 9,327.14 CZK debt to the Prague public-transport operator is…
statusExplanation: Analytické čtení citované evidence, nikoli přímo doložený fakt.
note: Replaces the superseded CLM-26 wording that presented the fare hypothesis inside a verified claim and implied an insolvency search that never succeeded.

sources.title: Sbírka listin (or.justice.cz) — exekuční příkaz postižením obchodního podílu, T. Melichárek (C 85425/SL69/KSBR)
